market_pulse: EDC Week dominance across the Strip; LIV's talent-packed lineup (Tiësto tonight) competes with strong competitor programming, but Palm Tree Beach Club opening (today!) and Omnia Dayclub launch (May 15) create new competitive pressure.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: EDC Week peak - maximum tourist traffic through May 17
Multiple new venue openings (Palm Tree, Omnia Dayclub) = market saturation
Competitor lineups strong (Tiësto/David Guetta at Encore, DJ Snake/Steve Aoki at Tao Beach)
LIV has heavy hitter talent (Tiësto Fri 5/15, Four Color Zack Sat 5/16, David Guetta Mon 5/18)
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Lean into exclusive content (behind-the-scenes of Tiësto setup, artist interviews) and aggressive Story/IG Reel content to differentiate from competitor generic event posts. Flash promo: early-bird pricing for Saturday shows.

content_gaps.description: Competitors posting fan videos/clips of dances, reactions at shows; LIV not aggregating/resharing user TikToks
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create #LIVStrip or #LIVNightlife hashtag, encourage fan submissions, repost 3-5x daily during EDC Week

content_gaps.description: Encore, Palm Tree, Omnia posting hour-by-hour 'doors opening soon' countdown Stories; LIV missing real-time engagement
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post Story countdowns starting 2 hours before doors (Fri 8PM for LIV Nightclub 10PM show)

content_gaps.description: Tao Beach, Zouk actively tagging influencers arriving for EDC Week; LIV not leveraging influencer arrivals
content_gaps.suggested_action: Reach out to 5+ EDC-attending influencers (5K-50K followers) today for arrival content + story takeovers Fri-Sun

influencer_activity.mention: Heavily posting Disco Lines DJ sets at LIV Beach during EDC Week; organic user engagement 'vibes so good' commentary.
LIV Beach Fri 5/15 confirmed on @livbeach IG bio; John Summit massive draw for dayclub crowd
Multiple confirmations across @livlv and @livbeach: Guetta performing Mon 5/18 night + Sat 5/16 day
Tao Beach Sunday 5/17 headline; Palm Tree posting 'Sunday with Steve Aoki' content; major draw competing for LIV audience

liv_outreach_targets.reason: EDC Week Tao Beach Thu 5/14 — attract crossover audience to LIV for alternative sound
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_content: Snippet of Porter's Tao set + LIV alternative Friday programming

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Tao Beach Fri 5/15 (same day as Tiësto at LIV) — create FOMO by highlighting Tiësto exclusive experience
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_content: LIV 'Tiësto icon status' content vs. Snake's energy at beach club
